title: Three Holy Spirit Steps to Reclaim Your Mornings
summary: Screens buzz, calendars swell, and quiet time with God slips to the margins. This simple three-step rhythm—mind, Word, prayer—turns distracted mornings into grounded, joy-filled starts.
